text.title: schema-field-order Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for schema-field-order as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: id field first based on title that does not exist yet.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Model invents a placeholder, then writes a title that does not match the slug. Move id last.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Model commits to confidence with no answer to be confident about. Move confidence last.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Action is decided blind. Analysis first, action last.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tags pulled from thin air. Summary first, tags last.
